aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as structured content and schema markup, but lacks depth in content optimization and user engagement features.
quick_wins: Enhance service pages with more detailed content and relevant keywords to improve search visibility.
Implement a review generation strategy to build a strong online reputation and gain Google reviews.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords to improve search engine ranking.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has a clear business description and contact information, but lacks detailed location-specific content and customer reviews.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business presents itself as a trusted HVAC and indoor air quality expert, but the website lacks the depth of content and customer engagement needed for better local search performance.
critical_issues: No Google reviews, which are crucial for local search visibility and trust.
Lack of location-specific content that could improve local search rankings.
No clear call-to-action for customer engagement or feedback.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information on its website, but lacks citations in local directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify a Google My Business profile to improve local search presence.
List the business in local directories and ensure NAP consistency across all platforms.
Encourage satisfied customers to leave reviews on Google and other relevant platforms.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and engagement.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers looking for HVAC services.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing meta tags.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, location-specific content and building a strong backlink profile.

page_title: Red Apple Air | Trusted HVAC & Indoor Air Quality Expert
